title: Ropedia Xperience-10M Public Surface QA
scope: Repo README, GitHub Pages HTML, Hugging Face Space card, artifact dataset card, and model card.

checks.name: public_surface_files_exist
checks.reason: Repo README, website HTML, and three Hugging Face cards should all be present in the publication workspace.

checks.name: core_status_reports_pass
checks.reason: Current public-surface QA depends on the existing validators already reporting pass.

checks.name: website_has_research_seo_metadata
checks.reason: The website should expose search/social metadata and structured project metadata.

checks.name: website_tabs_are_accessible_and_keyboardable
checks.reason: The long research dashboard should be navigable as real tabs, including keyboard support.

checks.name: responsive_navigation_guard_present
checks.reason: Tablet/mobile navigation should not overflow and deep links should land below sticky navigation.

checks.name: public_naming_consistent
checks.reason: Public copy should consistently present the project as Ropedia Xperience-10M, with the Qwen3-Omni scale-up boundary.

checks.name: public_links_cover_repo_hf_dataset_and_ropedia
checks.reason: Public cards should link the repo, Space, artifacts, model baselines, upstream dataset, and Ropedia dataset page.

checks.name: public_artifact_qa_files_are_exposed
checks.reason: Readers should be able to find integrity, publication, mirror, and public-surface QA files from public copy.

checks.name: public_copy_avoids_internal_or_meta_tone
checks.reason: Public copy should not expose internal tooling, private hardware labels, assessment framing, or meta design-process wording.

boundary: This report validates public presentation quality and packaging hygiene. It does not prove multi-episode model quality.
